subcodes.first_line: O Lord, Life-Giver of the world and Educator of the nations! I beseech Thee, by Thy Most Great Name, to cast serenity into the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا محیی العالم و مربی الامم اسئلک بالاسم الاعظم ان تلقی السکینه فی قلب
subcodes.subjects: @degrees of faith; certitude, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @imagery in the Qur'an
